data.title: Gene Sequencing Tech Provider 10x Genomics' Q3 Sales Fall Short On Expectations, But CEO Sees Opportunity Ahead
data.description: 10x Genomics reported Q3 2024 revenue of $151.7 million, down 1% from last year. Instruments revenue dropped 46%, while consumables grew 10%. CEO Serge Saxonov acknowledged the challenges faced but remains confident in future growth.

data.title: Michael Jordan Buys A New Private Jet That Is Also Owned By Tech Billionaires Elon Musk And Jeff Bezos
data.description: Basketball player Michael Jordan is rumored to have taken delivery of a new Gulfstream G650ER, a popular business jet among the rich and famous.

data.title: India's Philanthropy Titan Ratan Tata, Who Once Moved Starbucks Founder Howard Schultz To Tears, Passes Away At 86: 'Man With So Much Grace'
data.description: Renowned philanthropist and former chairman of Tata Group, Ratan Tata, passed away at the age of 86 on Oct. 9. Tata was admitted to Mumbai's Breach Candy hospital in a critical condition where he breathed his last.

data.title: In 2022, Bitcoin 'Helped To Humble' Anthony Pompliano: A Look At How His Price Predictions Have Evolved
data.description: Anthony Pompliano, the Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) bull and co-founder of Morgan Creek Digital, faced a turning point in 2022 when his cryptocurrency predictions failed to materialize as he had hoped.

data.title: How To Watch Tesla Robotaxi Day Live: Elon Musk's Autonomous Vehicle Event Is Here
data.description: Tesla Robotaxi Day will be livestreamed for people unable to attend the highly anticipated Oct. 10 event.
